name: team subject year split with multiple team stat columns
description: Team subject + year split + multiple team-stat columns
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2022,2023]) as year), "team" as (SELECT team_code FROM (VALUES ('ARI'),('ATL'),('BAL'),('BUF'),('CAR'),('CHI'),('CIN'),('CLE'),('DAL'),('DEN'),('DET'),('GB'),('HOU'),('IND'),('JAX'),('KC'),('LA'),('LAC'),('LV'),('MIA'),('MIN'),('NE'),('NO'),('NYG'),('NYJ'),('PHI'),('PIT'),('SEA'),('SF'),('TB'),('TEN'),('WAS')) AS t(team_code)), "team_years" as (SELECT team.team_code, base_years.year FROM team CROSS JOIN base_years), "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(pass_yds) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays, SUM(rush_yds) AS team_rush_yds_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2022, 2023) group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year"), "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats" as materialized (select "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."nfl_team", sum(t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7.team_pass_yds_from_plays) as team_pass_yds_from_plays, sum(t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7.team_rush_yds_from_plays) as team_rush_yds_from_plays, "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."year" from "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7" group by "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."nfl_team", "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."year") select "team_years"."team_code", "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays" AS "team_pass_yds_from_plays_0", "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."team_rush_yds_from_plays" AS "team_rush_yds_from_plays_0", "team_years"."year" from "team_years" left join "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats" on "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "team_years"."team_code" and t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats.year = team_years.year group by "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays", "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."team_rush_yds_from_plays", "team_years"."year", "team_years"."team_code" order by "team_years"."team_code" asc limit 500
